    file static class SendInterceptor_Sample_CancelOrder
    {
        // Consumer.cs(41,22)
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InterceptsLocation(1, "O6Fenip62Dv2Ju8xH2YvoaQEAABDb25zdW1lci5jcw==")]
        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::Edict.Contracts.Commands.EdictCommandResult> InterceptSend(
            this global::Edict.Contracts.Sending.IEdictSender sender,
            global::Edict.Contracts.Commands.EdictCommand command)
        {
            if (sender is global::Edict.Core.Commands.EdictSender es)
            {
                var typed = (global::Sample.CancelOrder)command;
                return es.SendFastPathAsync<global::Sample.CancelOrder>(
                    typed,
                    typed.OrderId,
                    "CancelOrder",
                    "Sample.OrderCommandHandler",
                    extraTags: null);
            }
            return sender.Send(command);
        }
    }
}

{

    file sealed class InterceptsLocationAttribute : global::System.Attribute
    {
        public InterceptsLocationAttribute(int version, string data) { }

    file static class SendInterceptor_Sample_PlaceOrder

        // Consumer.cs(39,22)
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InterceptsLocation(1, "O6Fenip62Dv2Ju8xH2YvoSgEAABDb25zdW1lci5jcw==")]
        // Consumer.cs(40,22)
        [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InterceptsLocation(1, "O6Fenip62Dv2Ju8xH2YvoWYEAABDb25zdW1lci5jcw==")]
        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::Edict.Contracts.Commands.EdictCommandResult> InterceptSend(
            this global::Edict.Contracts.Sending.IEdictSender sender,
            global::Edict.Contracts.Commands.EdictCommand command)
        {
            if (sender is global::Edict.Core.Commands.EdictSender es)
            {
                var typed = (global::Sample.PlaceOrder)command;
                return es.SendFastPathAsync<global::Sample.PlaceOrder>(
                    typed,
                    typed.OrderId,
                    "PlaceOrder",
                    "Sample.OrderCommandHandler",
                    extraTags: static (c, a) =>
                    {
                        a.SetTag("edict.sku", c.Sku);
                    });
            }
            return sender.Send(command);
        }
    }
}
